title: 📚 CrescentLib • [Port]
description: A universal library created to support Bluemoon8377 mods. Common tags, status effects, procedures and more — all in one place!
body:
# Take note!
_This is an official port of the original mod, which we posted with the approval of the developer. All rights reserved. Special thanks to Bluemoon8377 for the incredible work on the original mod! For more details and access to the developer's official social media, check out the original mod page and profile:_
> - [Bluemoon8377 Profile](https://www.curseforge.com/members/bluemoon8377)
> - [Original CrescentLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crescentlib)

_This port of the mod will be updated to match the updates of the original mod, starting with the newest versions._
# Description:
**CresentLib** is a library that integrates and optimizes key elements for Bluemoon8377 mods to work. It provides:
- Common tags and categories for resources.
- Convenient status effects for gameplay modification.
- Structured routines and tools to simplify development.

This library is used in popular mods:
- [_Unusual Delight_](https://modrinth.com/mod/unusualdelight)
- [_Mineral Delight_](https://modrinth.com/mod/mineral-delight-port)
- [_Hotdog Delight_](https://modrinth.com/mod/hotdog-delight-port)

You can freely use “CresentLib” in your projects. It is designed to save time and make the process of creating mods more convenient.
